title: Transaction value object
description: Implement an immutable Transaction class representing a single financial event on an account.
requirements: Transaction is immutable — all fields set at construction, no setters
Fields: String id, TransactionType type (enum: CREDIT, DEBIT), double amount, String description, java.time.LocalDate date
TransactionType enum is defined as a nested public enum inside Transaction
Constructor throws IllegalArgumentException if id, description, or date is null or blank
Getters: getId(), getType(), getAmount(), getDescription(), getDate()
toString() returns a readable summary, e.g. 'Transaction[id=t1, type=CREDIT, amount=100.00, description=Salary, date=2026-05-31]'
context: Package is com.teamtom, Java 21. No third-party dependencies. This class will be used by BudgetAccount (task-003).
